questionHtml:
Which elements are considered to be metalloids?

I.   Gallium

II.  Germanium

III. Arsenic


A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III

meta.title: Which elements are considered to be metalloids? I. Gallium II. Germanium III. Arsenic A. I and II only B. I and III only C. II and III only D. I, II and III
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 3.1—The periodic table: Classification of elements
Structure 3.1.1—The periodic table consists of periods, groups and blocks. Identify the positions of metals, metalloids and non-metals in the periodic table.
